tasks.title: Performance optimizations for iodine C code
tasks.notes: Plans documented. User to decide which optimizations to implement.

completed.title: Fix header lowercase bug in iodine_connection.h
completed.summary: Fixed bug at line ~880: changed || to && in uppercase detection. Was lowercasing ALL characters instead of just A-Z.

completed.title: Update benchmark module with crypto benchmarks
completed.summary: Added 7 new benchmark methods: crypto_symmetric (AEAD ciphers vs OpenSSL), crypto_asymmetric (Ed25519/X25519 vs OpenSSL/RbNaCl), hashing (SHA-2/3, BLAKE2 vs OpenSSL/Digest), crypto_ecies (X25519 ECIES vs RbNaCl), crypto_kdf (HKDF vs OpenSSL), crypto_totp (vs ROTP gem), and crypto_all convenience method.

completed.title: Review and fix documentation inaccuracies
completed.summary: Reviewed Iodine documentation against C implementation. Fixed return types for threads/workers (Integer, not Integer|nil). Added error logging behavior notes for threads=/workers= setters. Verified 11 other methods were already accurate.

completed.title: Update AI-MEMORY.json with new AES crypto primitives
completed.summary: Added AES-128-GCM and AES-256-GCM to symmetric_encryption section. Updated X25519_ECIES with ruby_api variants. Updated proposed_ruby_api classes.

completed.title: Update Ruby documentation for new AES modules
completed.summary: Added Iodine::Base::Crypto::AES128GCM and AES256GCM modules to documentation.rb. Added encrypt_aes128/decrypt_aes128/encrypt_aes256/decrypt_aes256 methods to X25519 module.

completed.title: Add AES-based ECIES variants to X25519
completed.summary: Added encrypt_aes128, decrypt_aes128, encrypt_aes256, decrypt_aes256 methods to Iodine::Base::Crypto::X25519 module using fio_x25519_encrypt/decrypt with AES-GCM functions.

completed.title: Implement AES-GCM module (AES128GCM, AES256GCM)
completed.summary: Added Iodine::Base::Crypto::AES128GCM and AES256GCM modules to iodine_crypto.h with encrypt/decrypt methods. Uses fio_aes128_gcm_enc/dec and fio_aes256_gcm_enc/dec from CSTL.

completed.title: Update Ruby documentation (documentation.rb)
completed.summary: Comprehensive update to lib/iodine/documentation.rb. Added: Iodine::Base::Crypto (ChaCha20Poly1305, XChaCha20Poly1305, Ed25519, X25519, HKDF), Iodine::PubSub::Engine::Redis, missing Utils methods (sha256, sha512, sha3_*, blake2*, totp_secret, totp_verify), TLS.default/default=, Connection methods (http?, peer_addr, from). Enhanced all existing docs with proper YARD tags.

completed.title: Review and fix C code documentation
completed.summary: Reviewed all 20 C extension files in ext/iodine/. Enhanced documentation for iodine_core.h, iodine_listener.h, iodine_pubsub_eng.h, iodine_pubsub_msg.h, iodine_json.h, iodine_minimap.h, iodine_threads.h, iodine_tls.h, iodine_connection.h. Other files already had adequate documentation.

completed.title: Add XChaCha20-Poly1305 to Iodine::Base::Crypto
completed.summary: Added Iodine::Base::Crypto::XChaCha20Poly1305 module with encrypt/decrypt methods. Uses 24-byte nonce (safe for random generation) vs 12-byte for ChaCha20-Poly1305.

completed.title: Create Ruby Wrapper for Redis Engine
completed.summary: Created Iodine::PubSub::Engine::Redis class wrapping fio_redis_* C API. 29 tests passing.

completed.title: Update extconf.rb for compile-time TLS default
completed.summary: Added IODINE_USE_EMBEDDED_TLS env var for compile-time TLS backend selection.

completed.title: Make Iodine::TLS.default settable
completed.summary: Replaced DEFAULT constant with getter/setter methods for runtime global TLS backend selection.

completed.title: Extend Iodine::Utils with hashing functions
completed.summary: Added sha256, sha512, sha3_256, sha3_512, blake2b, blake2s, hmac256 to Iodine::Utils.

completed.title: Extend TOTP utilities
completed.summary: Added totp_secret(len:) for generating Base32 secrets and totp_verify(secret:, code:, window:) for verification.

completed.title: Fix TOTP API documentation
completed.summary: Fixed incomplete documentation comments for totp, totp_secret, totp_verify. Also fixed bug where totp() didn't pass interval parameter to fio_otp().

completed.title: Create Iodine::Base::Crypto module
completed.summary: Created iodine_crypto.h with ChaCha20Poly1305, Ed25519, X25519, and HKDF submodules.

discoveries.redis: COMPLETED - Ruby wrapper created, 29 tests passing
discoveries.tls: COMPLETED - Compile-time and runtime global selection implemented
discoveries.crypto: COMPLETED - Full crypto suite with AES-GCM, ChaCha20-Poly1305, XChaCha20-Poly1305, and X25519 ECIES variants
discoveries.documentation: COMPLETED - Reviewed and fixed inaccuracies in lib/iodine/documentation.rb
discoveries.performance: Bug fixed. 5 optimization plans documented, awaiting user decision.
